decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing Emmara, Soul of the Accord's ability to create tokens efficiently and quickly, putting pressure on the opponent with a swarm of creatures. The deck includes cards that support aggro playstyle, such as Brightglass Gearhulk, Defiant Survivor, and Frenzied Baloth, to amplify the aggression and overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, cards like Glare of Subdual and Parallax Wave are included to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategies. The deck also includes mana ramp options like Birchlore Rangers and Lush Portico to ensure a smooth curve and consistent token generation. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to flood the board with tokens and quickly beat down the opponent before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on aggressive play with a combination of disruption and removal spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. The commander, Ketramose, the New Dawn, provides a strong creature that can quickly close out games if left unchecked. The deck includes a mix of early game threats and powerful late-game finishers to maintain pressure throughout the match. It also utilizes cards that disrupt the opponent's game plan, such as hand disruption spells and exile effects. Overall, the deck aims to be proactive and efficient, aiming to quickly establish a board presence and overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main strategy of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disrupt their game plan with hatebears and removal spells. By utilizing cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Sanctifier en-Vec, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's plays while building up its own board presence. Cards like Swords to Plowshares and Path to Exile help deal with threats efficiently, while Steel Seraph and Palace Jailer provide powerful creatures to close out the game. The deck also includes cards like Stoneforge Mystic and Skullclamp to generate card advantage and maintain pressure on the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and disrupt the opponent's strategy to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a variety of counterspells, removal spells, card draw, and disruptive creatures. Utilizing Tasigur, the Golden Fang as the commander, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan and outvalue them over the long game. The key strategy involves disrupting the opponent's plays with counterspells like Counterspell and Cryptic Command, removing threats with cards like Fatal Push and Toxic Deluge, and generating card advantage with cards like Brainstorm and Snapcaster Mage. The deck aims to control the board state and ultimately win the game through attrition and incremental advantage.

The main concept here is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive game plan, utilizing a mix of efficient creatures, burn spells, and disruptive elements to control the battlefield. Asmoranomardicadaistinaculdacar serves as the commander to provide card advantage and create pressure early on. The deck includes a variety of removal spells like Lightning Bolt, Fatal Push, and Dismember to deal with threats and keep the opponent on the back foot. Additionally, cards like Demonic Tutor and Tainted Pact offer consistency in finding key pieces of the deck quickly. Overall, the strategy revolves around deploying threats quickly, disrupting the opponent's game plan, and finishing them off before they can stabilize.

This deck revolves around utilizing the graveyard as a resource to cheat out powerful creatures and spells ahead of curve. Emet-Selch, Unsundered serves as the commander, providing a strong aggro strategy with various reanimation spells like Animate Dead and Dance of the Dead. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek, while also having counter spells like Daze and Force Spike to protect its own threats. By efficiently managing the graveyard and deploying threats quickly, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Trench Gorger, ultimately securing the win through aggressive plays and resource management.

The deck focuses on aggressive tactics and utilizing the abilities of Slimefoot and Squee to generate value and pressure the opponent. It includes a mix of creatures, removal spells, and mana ramp to control the board and maintain a steady stream of threats. The deck also features cards that enable recursion, tutoring, and card advantage to ensure a consistent and powerful game plan. By combining synergy between Slimefoot and Squee with a versatile toolkit of spells and creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through a combination of aggression and resource management.

The deck focuses on utilizing Spider-Man 2099 as the commander to create a fast and aggressive strategy in a Duel Commander 1 vs 1 format. It includes a mix of control spells, instant removal, and card draw to maintain board presence and disrupt opponents' strategies. The deck also features various burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Pyrokinesis to deal damage directly to the opponent. Additionally, it includes counterspells like Counterspell and Force Spike to protect important creatures and prevent key spells from resolving. The mana base is optimized for consistency and includes fetch lands to ensure the right colors of mana are available when needed.
